title: trifolium aurantiacum
intro: Trifolium aurantiacum, also known as the orange clover, is a perennial herb belonging to the Fabaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting digestive health. Trifolium aurantiacum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to support overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
